message:
feat(core): re-export lock_order and metrics modules

Expose OrderedMutex, OrderedRwLock, LockLevel, Counter, GaugeI64,
GaugeU64, Log2Histogram, GlobalMetrics, and global_metrics() from
mcp_agent_mail_core so all downstream crates can use them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
